proposed_hypotheses.text: Pembrolizumab monotherapy produces shorter progression-free survival in patients with EGFR mutations than in EGFR-wildtype patients.
Within this dataset, higher tumor mutational burden (TMB) is associated with lower objective response rates to pembrolizumab monotherapy.
Olaparib is broadly ineffective overall but produces exceptional objective response rates in patients whose tumors harbor a BRCA2 mutation.

analyses.result_summary: Within brca2_mutation=1, response rate difference is 0.55 (p<0.001).
